description: Canonical ActWarden feature specification. This file is the single source of truth for feature semantics. The Python packer (actwarden/python/actwarden/features.py) is the reference implementation; the C++ packer (actwarden/runtime/src/feature_packer.cpp) must produce bit-identical ordering and value-identical results within 1e-6. Golden vectors in actwarden/fixtures/golden/ gate parity.

window.ordering: spans sorted ascending by (start_time_unix_nano, span_id); window = last max_spans spans of a session

conventions: All features are float32 and clamped to [0, 1] after computation unless stated otherwise.
window_seconds = (max end_time_unix_nano - min start_time_unix_nano) / 1e9, floored at min_window_seconds.
p95 = sorted ascending durations, element at index ceil(0.95 * n) - 1 (no interpolation).
TOOL/LLM/RETRIEVER classification comes from Span.kind (mapped from openinference.span.kind at ingest).

features.name: error_run_norm
features.definition: longest consecutive run of ERROR spans in window order / max_error_run

features.name: tool_ngram_repeat_ratio
features.definition: over the ordered sequence of tool.name for TOOL spans: 0 if fewer than loop_ngram tool calls, else 1 - unique_ngrams/total_ngrams for n=loop_ngram

features.name: tool_entropy_norm
features.definition: Shannon entropy (bits) of tool.name distribution over TOOL spans / log2(entropy_ref_tools); 0 if no TOOL spans

features.name: cost_slope_norm
features.definition: 0.5 if count(spans) < 2, else clamp01(((cost(second half) - cost(first half)) / budget_usd + 1) / 2); halves split at floor(n/2) in window order

features.name: retrieval_low_conf_ratio
features.definition: among RETRIEVER spans: fraction with max(retrieval.document_scores) < low_confidence_threshold; empty score lists count as low-confidence; 0 if no RETRIEVER spans

features.name: depth_max_norm
features.definition: max span depth / max_depth; depth = 1 + depth(parent) when parent_span_id resolves inside the window, else 1

features.name: fanout_max_norm
features.definition: max count of children (by parent_span_id, resolved within window) of any span / max_fanout

features.name: stagnation_norm
features.definition: (window_end - start of last novelty event) / (window_end - window_start); novelty event = first span in window with key kind+'\x1f'+(tool.name if TOOL else name); 0 if window duration <= 0

risk_heads.name: cost_risk
risk_heads.meaning: cost or token growth on track to exceed budget

risk_heads.name: tool_misuse_risk
risk_heads.meaning: unsafe or anomalous tool usage patterns
